title: Sausage Gochujang Linguine with Sesame Pangrattato
summary: Fusion pasta at its finest, using a batch of your Sausage Gochujang Ragù with silky linguine, crispy chilli oil, and a nutty sesame crumb topping for extra crunch. What's not to love?

method.description: Before you begin, make the Sausage Gochujang Ragú.
Bring a large pan of salted water to the boil and cook the linguine until just al dente. Reserve a ladle of pasta water before draining.

In a small frying pan, toast the panko breadcrumbs with a drizzle of olive oil and 1 tsp of the sesame seeds over a medium heat. Stir regularly for 3–4 mins until golden and nutty. Remove from the heat and stir through the grated parmesan.

Heat the Sausage Gochujang Ragù in a large frying pan over a low heat until warmed through.Add the cooked pasta to the ragù along with a splash of the reserved pasta water. Toss until glossy and fully coated, adding more water if needed.
Divide between bowls and scatter over the sesame pangrattato. Finish with a drizzle of crispy chilli oil, a pinch of sesame seeds and lime wedges on the side, if you like.

chefs.name: Mob
chefs.summary: Mob is on a mission to instil a love of cooking in everyone, because we believe in the positive impact that it can have on people's lives.
